findings.message: @playwright/test@1.59.1 and @axe-core/playwright@4.11.2 are both devDependencies — correct, they do not contribute to the production bundle. @playwright/test is Apache-2.0 licensed; @axe-core/playwright is MPL-2.0. Both are compatible with this project. pnpm audit should be run to confirm no known CVEs, but these are well-maintained packages with a strong security track record.
